nasb.text: Now on the day when you wave the sheaf, you shall offer a male lamb one year old without defect for a burnt offering to the Lord.

esv.text: And on the day when you wave the sheaf, you shall offer a male lamb a year old without blemish as a burnt offering to the Lord.

cnv.text: 你們搖禾捆的時候，要把一隻一歲、沒有瑕疵的公綿羊作燔祭獻給耶和華。

ccb.text: 在献谷物那天，你们要献给耶和华一只毫无残疾、一岁的公羊羔作燔祭，
